news.title: SpaceX valuation balloons to $2.6T, briefly passes Amazon
news.summary: SpaceX's valuation has increased by $1 trillion since its shares started trading on Friday.

news.title: Qualcomm wants to be the chip inside whatever replaces your smartphone, and it just announced two products toward that end
news.summary: Qualcomm CEO Cristiano Amon said Tuesday that the company is working on over 40 different AI wearable devices — including jewelry, earbuds with cameras, pins, and watches — a sign of how aggressively the chipmaker is betting that the next major computing platform won't be a phone.

news.title: Bug in FIFA World Cup internal system gave anyone ability to modify TV stream
news.summary: A security researcher said a flaw in FIFA’s online platforms allowed her to access several internal systems, including one that could have allowed her to take control of the TV stream of every World Cup match.

news.title: Android 17 launches with new multitasking tools as Google expands Gemini features
news.summary: Google has released Android 17 and Wear OS 7, introducing new multitasking features, parental controls, security tools, and smartwatch upgrades. The launch is also accompanied by a Pixel Drop that brings Google’s latest AI models to its devices.

news.title: Mobileye’s US robotaxi launch will put it on both sides of the AV business
news.summary: Mobileye apparently wants to own some of the robotaxi market, even if that puts it in direct competition with companies it supplies its self-driving system to.

news.title: The Complete Calvin and Hobbes is a great last-minute Father’s Day gift
news.summary: Father’s Day is nearly here. Hopefully, you already got a gift for dads you care about, but if not, here’s a quick, easy recommendation for anyone who enjoys a good comic strip. The Complete Calvin and Hobbes contains every one of Bill Watterson’s beloved strips made during the comic’s ten-year run

news.title: All the latest news on Android 17, Wear OS 7, and Android XR
news.summary: Google’s Android 17 update includes highlights like new floating “Bubble” app windows for easier multitasking, a Screen Reaction recording mode, and a 50/50 split gaming mode for foldable phones. news.title: Android 17 arrives on Pixel phones today
news.summary: Following its official debut last month, Google is now rolling out Android 17 to compatible Pixel phones, alongside additional exclusive features as part of the June Pixel Drop. news.title: Google launches Wear OS 7 with Live Updates and a battery life boost
news.summary: Google's Wear OS 7 update is starting to roll out today for the Pixel Watch 2, 3, and 4 , adding a new Live Updates feature that tracks live events from your Android smart watch. news.title: Verizon’s ‘Simplicity’ flat-rate plan starts at $30 per month for new customers
news.summary: Verizon is launching a new Simplicity plan that starts at $30 / month for new customers, or $45 / month for existing ones. news.title: Pentagon boasts of using AI to write reports mandated by Congress
news.summary: Pentagon also claims 1.5 million personnel are using generative AI tools.

news.title: Android 17 starts hitting Pixel phones and watches today
news.summary: Pixels will get their OTA in the coming weeks, but don't expect monumental changes.

news.title: Trump admin abandons fight against wind energy as clean energy output surges
news.summary: Legal victories have dampened the Trump admin’s efforts to halt wind and solar power.

news.title: SpaceX to acquire AI coding platform Cursor for $60 billion
news.summary: Separately, neither could compete. Now they hope they can.

news.title: Leak Exposes Members of Peter Thiel’s Secretive ‘Dialog’ Society
news.summary: More than 200 of the world's elites registered for a retreat whose agenda runs from panels on cult-building and sex to prepping for World War III. An associated app offers matchmaking.

news.title: Why the Reflecting Pool Is Full of Algae After Trump's Renovation
news.summary: Warm weather has fueled a bloom that National Park Service workers are trying to kill using everything from hydrogen peroxide to nanobubbles ahead of July 4 celebrations.

news.title: ‘Dangerous’ AI Models Are Coming No Matter What
news.summary: The US government crackdown on Anthropic’s Claude Fable 5 and Mythos 5 hides a glaring truth: AI models with advanced hacking capabilities will soon be the norm.

news.title: Nimble’s New Modular Power Bank Can Be Shared With a Friend
news.summary: Nimble’s thoughtfully designed SharePower is a modular power bank you can share with a friend.

news.title: The Future of Home
news.summary: How we live now is defined by unprecedented forces. In this special issue, WIRED and Architectural Digest help you understand what home will look like tomorrow—and beyond.
